languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

languages.text: "Шерин, мне, наверное, впервые в жизни придется согласиться с этой сумасшедшей. Местные жители — суровые и безжалостные люди, но, кажется, надежные сверх меры".
"Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

"Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

languages.text: 「シェリーン、私はこの狂った女に初めて同意せざるをえなくなるかもしれない。地元の人たちは冷酷で容赦ないが、信頼できるようだ」
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: 「シェリーン、私はこの狂った女に初めて同意せざるをえなくなるかもしれない。地元の人たちは冷酷で容赦ないが、信頼できるようだ。」

languages.text: « Shereen, je crois que, pour la première fois de ma vie, je suis d'accord avec cette cinglée. Les habitants de cette planète sont rudes et impitoyables, mais ils semblent extrêmement fiables. »
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: « Shereen, je crois que, pour la première fois de ma vie, je suis d'accord avec cette cinglée. Les habitants de cette planète sont rudes et impitoyables, mais ils semblent extrêmement fiables. »

languages.text: "Shereen, ich fürchte, ich muss dieser Wahnsinnigen zum ersten Mal in meinem Leben zustimmen. Die Menschen hier sind hart und erbarmungslos, aber offenbar über die Maßen verlässlich."
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: "Shereen, ich fürchte, ich muss dieser Wahnsinnigen zum ersten Mal in meinem Leben zustimmen. Die Menschen hier sind hart und erbarmungslos, aber offenbar über die Maßen verlässlich."

languages.text: "Şirinim, hayatımda ilk defa bu deli kadınla aynı fikirde olmak zorunda kalabilirim. Yerliler sert ve acımasız ama ölçülemeyecek kadar güvenilir görünüyorlar."
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: "Şirinim, hayatımda ilk defa bu deli kadınla aynı fikirde olmak zorunda kalabilirim. Yerliler sert ve acımasız ama ölçülemeyecek kadar güvenilir görünüyorlar."

languages.text: «Shereen, puede que sea la primera vez en mi vida que estoy de acuerdo con esta lunática. Los lugareños son gente dura y despiadada, pero a mí me parecen de fiar».
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: «Shereen, puede que sea la primera vez en mi vida que estoy de acuerdo con esta lunática. Los lugareños son gente dura y despiadada, pero a mí me parecen de fiar».

languages.text: “亲爱的，这可能是我这辈子头一次同意这疯女人的话。当地人冷酷无情，但似乎极其可靠。”
languages.original_text: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: “亲爱的，这可能是我这辈子头一次同意这疯女人的话。当地人冷酷无情，但似乎极其可靠。”
